title: blumea benthamiana var. minor
intro: Blumea benthamiana var. minor is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the minor or small variety of Blumea benthamiana. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Blumea benthamiana var. minor is often prepared for herbal use in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments.
